title: Device Home Screen - No Device Connected - Supported List - Other Devices
feature: Device Home Screen - No Device Connected - Supported List - Other Devices
scenario: Verify "Supported Devices" link and "Other devices" button behavior when no devices are connected
steps: Tap the 'Supported Devices' link on the home screen.
Verify the bottom text matches the Figma design.
Confirm it opens the Poly support products web page.
expected: The bottom text matches the Figma design, and tapping the "Other devices" button opens the Poly support products web page.
